data.title: Boeing Machinists Reject 35% Wage Hike Deal, Extending 5-Week Strike Amid $6B Loss And Cash Burn Warnings
data.description: Boeing Co machinists rejected a new labor deal with 64% voting against the proposal, their union announced Wednesday, extending a strike that has halted most of the company's Seattle-area production for over five weeks.

data.title: North Korean Troops Land In Russia, Sparking Fears Of Escalation In Ukraine Conflict
El Salvador's President Nayib Bukele Donates Bitcoin To Support Funding For 1,000 Schools Through Charity Run
data.description: El Salvador president Nayib Bukele donated Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) to well-known philanthropist Shin Fujiyama to help raise funds to build schools in the Central American nation of Honduras.

data.title: McDonald's Where Trump Worked Review-Bombed On Yelp: 'Fries Too Salty As If Someone Who Lost A Major Election Had Been Crying Over Them'
data.description: Fans and critics of Donald Trump took to Yelp to leave 1-star and 5-star reviews on a Pennsylvania McDonald's location the former president worked at recently.

data.title: Ozempic And Wegovy Maker Novo Nordisk Asks FDA To Halt Production Of Compounded Fat Loss Drugs Due To Their 'Inherent Complexity'
